name: Extraction-fidelity review repair for D+Q bone RCT revision candidate
summary: Creates the missing extraction_fidelity supervisor review for candidate-revision-senolytics-bone-rct-extraction-refresh-2026-06-21-repair. The review accepts this lane because the repair candidate accurately preserves the original D+Q extraction-refresh candidate as needs_revision and does not claim that unresolved publication-table, supplement/subgroup, or event-specific adverse-event extraction gaps have been corrected.

scope.question: Add the missing extraction_fidelity review lane for the D+Q bone RCT extraction-refresh revision-state repair candidate.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks the bounded self-healing repair that supplies the missing extraction_fidelity supervisor review lane.
